finding.rootCause: Instant chat recognized some follow-ups but packed only the newest contiguous topic, so a named return could receive an unrelated turn and natural implicit follow-ups could receive no context.
finding.correction: The bounded selector now detects natural implicit follow-ups and retrieves matching recent turns plus nearby corrections while excluding intervening unrelated subjects.

nextCycle: Exercise the complete browser account lifecycle and authorization-error recovery across customer/admin hosts and roles.
